testcase.name: testViewAllTotalCount
testcase.system-out:
[SUCCESS] PHP 200.00 added. Balance: PHP 5000.00 → PHP 5200.00 [SUCCESS] PHP 300.00 added. Balance: PHP 5200.00 → PHP 5500.00 [SUCCESS] PHP 1500.00 added. Balance: PHP 12500.75 → PHP 14000.75 [SUCCESS] PHP 1000.00 sent to User #2. Your balance: PHP 4500.00 [SUCCESS] PHP 500.00 sent to User #3. Your balance: PHP 14500.75

testcase.name: testPolymorphicSeedingLogsCorrectly
testcase.system-out:
[TEST] Running: Cash-In [SUCCESS] PHP 200.00 added. Balance: PHP 12500.75 → PHP 12700.75 [TEST] Running: Cash-In [SUCCESS] PHP 200.00 added. Balance: PHP 12700.75 → PHP 12900.75 [TEST] Running: Cash-Transfer [SUCCESS] PHP 50.00 sent to User #3. Your balance: PHP 4950.00
── ALL TRANSACTIONS (4 records) ── [#1 ] PHP 200.00 | Poly2 | 2026-04-20 04:03:16 | CASH-IN (external) [#2 ] PHP 200.00 | Poly2 | 2026-04-20 04:03:16 | CASH-IN (external) [#3 ] PHP 50.00 | SENT – Poly3 | 2026-04-20 04:03:16 | SENT → User #3 [#4 ] PHP 50.00 | RECEIVED – Poly3 | 2026-04-20 04:03:16 | RECEIVED ← User #1
